title: Introduction
subtitle: The story behind KodaPost and what we believe in.
philosophy.heading: Our Philosophy
philosophy.p1.before: KodaPost was built on a simple belief:
philosophy.p1.bold: the best content comes from real people with real stories.
philosophy.p1.after: In a world increasingly filled with algorithmically generated images, auto-written captions, and machine-produced art, we chose a different path.
philosophy.p2: We believe that photography, written storytelling, and verbal expression are deeply human acts of creativity. A photograph you took on a morning walk, a story you wrote about your grandmother’s kitchen, a voice memo you recorded while an idea was still fresh. These are the raw materials of meaningful content. No algorithm can replicate the intention, emotion, and perspective you bring to your own work.
humanFirst.heading: Human-First Creativity
humanFirst.p1.after: Every phonographic carousel starts with your photos, your words, and your vision. We never generate images from scratch, fabricate stories, or replace your voice with synthetic text. The creative decisions, what to photograph, which moments matter, what story to tell, and how to tell it, those always belong to you.
humanFirst.p2.before: This is what we mean by
humanFirst.p2.after: : the belief that real people should continue to create art through photography, written expression, and verbal storytelling. The curation, the editorial choices, and the creative direction are yours alone. Koda is not the artist here. You are.
roleOfKoda.heading: The Role of Koda
roleOfKoda.intro: So where does Koda fit in? Koda takes a back seat. It handles the logistics and technical work that would otherwise slow you down:
roleOfKoda.features.0.label: Image Processing:
roleOfKoda.features.0.text: Applying vintage camera filters, film grain, and color grading to your photographs so they feel cohesive and intentional.
roleOfKoda.features.1.label: Style Templates:
roleOfKoda.features.1.text: Offering pre-built visual styles (Bold Statement, Vintage Serif, Editorial, and more) that set fonts, colors, and overlays in one click. You can customize any template to match your brand.
roleOfKoda.features.2.label: Layout and Formatting:
roleOfKoda.features.2.text: Arranging your photos into properly sized carousel slides for each social media platform, handling aspect ratios and safe zones automatically.
roleOfKoda.features.3.label: Text Suggestions:
roleOfKoda.features.3.text: Offering headline and caption ideas based on your theme and keywords. These are suggestions you can accept, edit, or ignore entirely.
roleOfKoda.features.4.label: Audio and Music:
roleOfKoda.features.4.text: Adding background audio to video-format exports. Record a voiceover, upload your own track, or browse the built-in music library.
roleOfKoda.features.5.label: Multi-Platform Publishing:
roleOfKoda.features.5.text: Exporting and publishing to Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, X/Twitter, YouTube, YouTube Shorts, and Reddit, each formatted to that platform’s specifications.
roleOfKoda.features.6.label: Technical Optimization:
roleOfKoda.features.6.text: Compositing images with text overlays, managing export quality, and handling platform-specific formatting automatically.
roleOfKoda.conclusion: In every case, Koda serves as your assistant, not your replacement. It handles the tedious production work so you can focus on what matters: your creative vision.
whatYouCanCreate.heading: What You Can Create
whatYouCanCreate.intro: KodaPost helps you produce polished phonographic carousels from your own photos, words, and audio. Here are the key features that set your work apart:
whatYouCanCreate.features.0.label: Creator Provenance:
whatYouCanCreate.features.0.text: Every carousel can be cryptographically signed with Ed25519, embedding tamper-proof authorship metadata directly into your exported files. This proves you created the work, with no third-party service required.
whatYouCanCreate.features.1.label: Brand Watermarks:
whatYouCanCreate.features.1.text: Add a visible watermark to your slides to protect your content and reinforce your brand identity across platforms.
whatYouCanCreate.features.2.label: Camera Emulation Filters:
whatYouCanCreate.features.2.text: Apply film stock emulations like Kodak Gold 200, Fuji Superia, and more to give your photos a consistent analog feel.
whatYouCanCreate.features.3.label: Video Export with Audio:
whatYouCanCreate.features.3.text: Turn your carousel into a slideshow video with crossfade transitions, timed to your background music or voiceover.
whoIsItFor.heading: Who Is KodaPost For?
whoIsItFor.intro: KodaPost is built for people who want to express their own creativity and independence without automation taking over:
whoIsItFor.audiences.0.label: Content Creators
whoIsItFor.audiences.0.text: who want to share authentic visual stories with their audience, not recycled templates or generated stock imagery.
whoIsItFor.audiences.1.label: Entrepreneurs
whoIsItFor.audiences.1.text: building personal brands rooted in genuine storytelling, where every post reflects who they actually are and what they actually do.
whoIsItFor.audiences.2.label: Artists and Photographers
whoIsItFor.audiences.2.text: who value the craft of image-making and want tools that enhance their work rather than replace it.
whoIsItFor.audiences.3.label: Anyone
whoIsItFor.audiences.3.text: who believes their voice, their perspective, and their creative choices matter more than what an algorithm would produce for them.
getStarted.heading: Get Started
getStarted.p1: Ready to create something that’s genuinely yours? Upload your photos, tell your story, and let KodaPost handle the rest of the production work. Your creativity leads, and we just make it easier to share.
getStarted.cta: Start creating your first phonographic carousel
